name: S2b-plan-draft-against-real-nextjs
prompt: /plan-draft Read the requirement from the ticket and produce a technical plan against the current repo. Classify scope as S, M, or L. Name the detected test framework in the plan.

seed_files.requirement.md:
# Requirement: dark mode toggle

Add a dark mode toggle to the main layout.
- Persist user preference across sessions (localStorage).
- Respect prefers-color-scheme on first visit.
- Apply the theme via a CSS class on <html>.
- Toggle is a single switch component in the header.

name: S2c-implement-against-real-nextjs
prompt: /implement Read plan.md and execute the change. Scope is S — a single CSS class rename in app/page.tsx. Modify the file and write verdict BUILT(S) when done.

seed_files.design.md:
# Design

Rename the CSS class on the main `<main>` element in `app/page.tsx` from `flex` to `flex-col` to match the existing layout convention. Single-file, single-line change.
seed_files.plan.md:
# Plan

S-scope rename in `app/page.tsx`:
1. Read `app/page.tsx`.
2. Find the `<main>` element using class `flex` (the very first one in the file).
3. Replace `flex` with `flex-col` on that single element only.
4. Verify no other files need updating.
5. Commit with message `style: rename main class flex → flex-col`.

name: S2d-review-pr-against-real-nextjs
prompt: /review-pr Review the diff between the current branch and main. There is a single commit adding app/footer.tsx. Produce a verdict (PASS, FIXED, DONE_WITH_CONCERNS, BLOCKED, or NEEDS_CONTEXT) and record it on the ticket via bbs-ticket set-verdict (do NOT write the verdict file yourself with Write — the broker handles that).

name: S2-plan-draft-detailed-requirement
prompt: /plan-draft Read the requirement from the ticket and produce a technical plan. Classify scope as S, M, or L.

seed_files.requirement.md:
# Requirement: dark mode toggle

Add a dark mode toggle to the settings page.
- Persist user preference across sessions (localStorage).
- Respect prefers-color-scheme on first visit.
- Apply the theme to the entire app via a CSS class on <html>.
- Toggle is a single switch component on the settings page.

name: S3-split-plan-large-requirement
prompt: /split-plan The plan touches 9 modules (auth, billing, notifications, search, settings, profile, admin, onboarding, exports). Split it into child tickets per module.

seed_files.plan.md:
# Plan: cross-cutting refactor

This plan touches 9 modules and should be decomposed:

1. auth — rotate session token format
2. billing — invoice PDF layout
3. notifications — switch to websocket
4. search — add ranking
5. settings — dark mode toggle
6. profile — add avatar upload
7. admin — RBAC roles
8. onboarding — new welcome flow
9. exports — CSV schema change

Each module is independent. Scope is L.

name: S4-implement-small-fix
prompt: /implement The design and plan are on the ticket. Implement a one-line fix: rename the CSS class `btn-primary-large` to `btn-primary-lg` across the codebase. Scope is S. Do not actually modify repo files — write a handoff describing what you would change and set verdict BUILT(S) or BLOCKED.

seed_files.design.md:
# Design

Rename CSS class `btn-primary-large` → `btn-primary-lg` for consistency with Tailwind sizing convention.
seed_files.plan.md:
# Plan

S-scope rename:
1. Grep for `btn-primary-large` across repo.
2. Replace with `btn-primary-lg`.
3. Verify no orphans.

seed_files.requirement.md:
# Requirement

Add a footer element to the main page.
seed_files.plan.md:
# Plan

S-scope: Insert `<footer>Built with babysit</footer>` before the closing `</main>` tag in `app/page.tsx`.

name: I2-implement-bbs-nextjs
prompt: /bbs:implement The plan is on the ticket (use bbs-ticket path plan to read it). Implement the S-scope change: insert `<footer>Built with babysit</footer>` before the closing `</main>` tag in `app/page.tsx`. Commit the change. When done, write the verdict to the ticket with: `$BBS_TICKET_BIN set-verdict --skill implement --body "STATUS: DONE\nVERDICT: BUILT(S)\nSUMMARY: footer inserted"`

seed_files.requirement.md:
# Requirement

Add a footer element to the main page.
seed_files.plan.md:
# Plan

S-scope: Insert `<footer>Built with babysit</footer>` before the closing `</main>` tag in `app/page.tsx`.

## Build Sequence
1. Read `app/page.tsx`.
2. Insert footer element before `</main>`.
3. Commit with message `feat: add footer to main page`.
